metadata.description: SUEWS plugins for AI agent ecosystems - runtime workflow rules for users and developer tooling for contributors

plugins.name: suews
plugins.description: Run, validate, and analyse SUEWS urban climate simulations from your AI assistant. Workflow rules, forcing-data checks, output interpretation, and common-error diagnostics.

plugins.name: suews-dev
plugins.description: Complete development toolkit for SUEWS contributors - environment setup, code linting, build verification, PR review, and release management
